_notes.adapter: 'mock' runs offline & free (default). Set to 'claude-cli' / 'codex-cli' to invoke the real authenticated CLIs (may incur cost).
_notes.model: Optional. OMIT the codex model on a ChatGPT-account Codex login (e.g. 'gpt-5-codex' returns 400 'not supported'); leaving it unset uses the account default. Claude accepts model ids like 'claude-opus-4-8'.
_notes.claudeProjects: Empty = ingest all ~/.claude/projects/* slugs. List slugs (e.g. '-Users-you') to restrict.
_notes.dbPath: Kept under ./data/ which is gitignored — the DB holds raw message content and is a sensitive artifact.
